pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh scripts explicitly define this exact path.
Task description and export_result.sh scripts explicitly define this exact path.
Task description and export_result.sh scripts explicitly enforce this password for mounting.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly reference this text file.

Task description explicitly states 128KB (which equals 131072 bytes) and VeraCrypt official documentation confirms the standard header size combined with the hidden volume header area is exactly 128 KiB (131072 bytes).

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated VeraCrypt volume created by the agent. Verified that the explicit password ('ProtocolGhost2024!'), volume path, header path, sample file name, and header extraction size (131072 bytes / 128 KB) exactly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, export scripts, and official VeraCrypt documentation.
